_comment: EVERY global tunable lives here (design pillar #2). Game hot-reloads this file in dev. Values documented in WEB_GAME_ROADMAP.md are marked; the rest are PLACEHOLDER pending CLAUDE.md verification.

autonomy._source: seek/stop from roadmap §2; cooldown PLACEHOLDER — verify vs CLAUDE.md

time._source: 60 s/day is the Unreal DEBUG speed — open decision #2, retune in Phase 1

map._source: which data/maps/<active>.json the game plays; set from the Map Editor "Play this map" button

character._source: edit this block through tools/animations.html (Animation Mapper): it lists the GLB's actual clips, previews them in 3D, and maps them to states. animationPaths = extra GLBs whose clips are merged in (Mixamo one-clip-per-file exports, same skeleton). sitHeight/lieHeight replace the old hardcoded 0.25/0.55. Missing/failed GLB keeps the capsule stand-in.

camera._source: PLACEHOLDER — clamps to be tuned against Sims reference screenshots
